characters.description: 32was one of the robot criminals that was put on a Prison Planet run byKlaar. 32 was a large humanoid robot aboutMegas' height with armor in white/gunmatel gray/and crimson, his arms possessed large curned blades on the forearms, large curved spikes on his knees, five-fingered hands, a pompadour-like crest on his head, and two eyes that change colors (blue when reprogrammed, and red when as himself). 32 was caught at an unknown point in time and sent to the prison planet, he was seen making a flower necklace and eventually metCoopJamieandKivawho asked him on their location and how to get back to earth which allowed 32 to begin to regain his memories, when another robot prisoner named14was shot down by the planets Robot Guards 32 finally regained his memories and was ready to attack the guards but was neutralized before he could make an attack.

characters.name: Ally
characters.description: AllyHomeworldEarthAffiliationCoop, Jaime, Kiva (formerly)Kiva (descendant)SpeciesHumanGenderfemaleHair colorRedEye colorBrownSkin colorLightly TanVoice actorJulie NathansonStatusAlive Kiva (descendant) Allyis a normal human female (presumably in her twenties), andKiva's distant ancestor in the present day. She only appears in a single episode,Terminate Her. Much to Kiva's displeasure, Ally has shown a mutual attraction to Jamie, even going as far as stopping to help him at the moment of danger. Ally appears to be quite skeptical about everything happening around her, even as she witnesses its reality firsthand. She even rejected Kiva's request to at least know each other better, despite them being (technically) family (Kiva being her descendant). She seems to be as dismissive as most of Jersey population and remains emotionally unmoved even when Glorft threaten to kill her, pushing away any and all who try to help her.

characters.name: Argo
characters.description: ArgoArgo Leader of the S-ForceHomeworldSarusAffiliationS-ForceSpeciesSarusianGenderMaleHair colorBlackSkin colorWhiteVoice actorScott InnesStatusAliveDeceased (Rearview Mirror, Mirror part 2)Argois the leader of a group of young superheroes from the planet Sarus called theS-Force. He is the voice byScott Innes At first Argo suspectedCoopto be a bad guy, but Argo later learned that he wasn't evil, just dull. Despite their misunderstanding, they became good friends and later helped each other battle several of their giant robot enemies. Argo pilots theRed Hawk Zorp. A humanoid man with black hair and wears a red suit with a red cape

He advises Coop that he get his license renewed to retrieveMegasfrom the impound lot and saveKiva.

characters.name: Captain Jean-Michel Warlock
characters.description: "I said I would let them go. The rest is up to them."- Jean-Michel Warlock Captain Warlock aboard his ship, theSaving Grace Captain Jean-Michel Warlockis a space pirate and captain of the pirate battleshipSaving Grace. He only appears in the episodeSpace Booty, where he is also the main focus. Warlock is handsome, dashing, and supremely confident. He has an obsessive fetish for red hair and it is vaguely implied that he is bisexual. He has a gallery of portraits of red-haired lovers which seems to include one androgynous-appearing male, though it's also possible this is merely a close friend. He also carries an air of suaveness and a cool demeanor, but it only serves to hide his true intentions. Once determined to have Kiva, he will stop at nothing to have her as his queen, and if denied would rather kill her rather than let her leave.

characters.name: Characters
characters.description: Main characters Reccuring characters Goat

characters.name: Comet
characters.description: CometComet is one member of the Ultra-CadetsHomeworldUltra-Cadet's plantAffiliationUltra-CadetsSpeciesHuman alienGenderFemaleHair colorPinkEye colorLight blueSkin colorTanVoice actorTara StrongStatusAlive Cometis a humanoid female and member of a group called theUltra-Cadets, who defend their planet and people from evil. She is voiced byTara Strong. Comet went to Earth to findCoop, but instead she mistook Coop forJamie. She and the others needed Coop's assistance in fighting theKurdock, so Jamie fooled her into taking him instead. Comet agreed that she and the other cadets would not be of much help to Jamie, so they agreed to let him fight Kurdock alone. After Jamie appears to defeat Kurdock, Comet and the other cadets hold a celebration on Jamie's honor. Just then Coop andKivaarrived looking for Jamie. Not aware of what is going on, Comet attempted to defend Jamie from what she assumed was a threat. Once the truth was revealed that Jamie was an impostor. Comet, along with the others angrily insisted that Coop and the others get him off their planet. In the end, the Ultra-Cadets were attacked by the Kurdock, but it's unknown if she survived, she apparently did survive luckily.

characters.name: Harold Cooplowski
characters.description: Harold Cooplowski, better known asCoop, is the protagonist ofMegas XLR, created by Jody Schaeffer. He is a young man in his adulthood who stumbled upon afragment of timeone day inthe junkyard. AlongsideJamieandKivahe does what he has to do to enjoy a regular day inJersey City, unless an alien has something to say about that. That being said, he turns out to be the defender ofEarthby driving hiscar.  Growing up from a young child into an adult along side of Jamie, as he dedicates most of his time to gaming consoles. Being a very laid back and care-free person, Coop displays that he doesn't look before he leaps, aside from the things which he loves, which are food, music, bowling, gaming, television and anything that involves him being entertained. Unlike Jamie, he shows very little interest in the opposite gender, seemingly more focused on simpler pleasures in life. Shown to be very persistent on getting what he wants, Coop would focus on fixing the problem and won't back away until the very end, regardless on how dangerous or immature it might be. He at times displays an affinity for music, but has no talent for it, with his singing ability being capable of inducing physical pain. He dreamed of being a wrestler, but couldn't compete in such as his body limited him, at least without a giant robot. Being famous was an ambition, just the thought of having his own action figure made his eyes sparkle. Coop can be extremely blatant, loudmouthed, thoughtless, foolhardy and blind that all his actions usually result in consequences, but in general could be considered a nice guy who can be depended on to do the right thing when necessary. Often underestimated physically, Coop has proved to have a lot of strength due to his weight, giving him a better body balance for certain situations such as managing to swing an extra large wrench for more than ten swings, and smashing his window door with a packing punch.  However, when it comes to stamina, that's where Coop's weakness enters. Being an overweight adult limits his body to running and dancing, which usually ends up with him extremely exhausted. As pilot ofM.E.G.A.S, his true strength shines. Since he completely modified Megas for full optimization of gaming consoles, he is able to control it as if he was playing a video game, allowing him to take his gaming skill to fuller potential. Usually upgrading Megas every few days, he comes up with new modifications to destroy anybody who stands in his way. However, these modifications aren't always labeled correctly, might backfire, and some of them might not work, which usually goes to show how clumsy and carefree Coop can be. Nevertheless, he ends up finding the right button in the end. Some of his modifications are used so often that they even get names (such as "Save Jamie" lever). Coop doesn't really look for trouble, trouble looks for him. As Coop progresses on with his casual life, certain enemies coming to Earth try to destroy it for their own self reason

characters.name: Cryoks
characters.description: Cryoks, otherwise known as the "Space Yetis" come from a planet that was being invaded by theCeruleans, evil transforming robots. Ator & The  Cyroks are the Voice by Keith Scarabakia & Steve Blum who playedJamie,Alternate Jamie,Bot 47 &the Gloft robotin the series. The chieftain of the Cryoks isAtor. They lived in an ice village. The village was protected by a defector of the Cerulean army butCoopdestroyed him when he mistookM.E.G.A.S.for an enemy. Ator then explained this to Coop and Coop in return became their guardian, for a short time. Coop helped them defeat the Ceruleans while at the same time destroying the planet Surell which kept their planet cool. All the ice melted and the Cryohocks now live on a warm planet with large tropical beaches thanks to Coop.

characters.description: I plan to extract the information from yourbrain. They say the process is quite painless, but I do hope they're wrong.  - Darklos is fighting Kiva Andru Darklos is cruel, ruthless, cunning arrogant and sadistic

characters.name: Duchess
characters.description: DuchessDuchess member of the S-ForceHomeworldSarusAffiliationS-ForceSpeciesSaurianGenderFemaleHair colorBlueEye colorBlueSkin colorWhiteVoice actorJennifer HaleStatusAliveDeceased (Rearview Mirror, Mirror part 2) Deceased (Rearview Mirror, Mirror part 2) Duchessis a member of a group of young superheroes called theS-Forcefrom the planet Sarus a group of intergalactic heroes who go around saving the universe from evil. Like all of S-Force, Duchess is virtuous to a fault. She comes across as a modest and polite young woman, chiding Jax for his rude language and later is mortified when Coop shows her how to belch using Rock Pops and soda. However much like the rest of S-Force, she eventually develops a love of video games, fast food, and other bad habits from Coop, including being so careless as to use her Zorp indoors to crash into a control panel for the sake of doing something 'cool'. If there's anything Duchess shows any disdain toward, its Jamie. She finds his not-so-subtle attempts to flirt with her repulsive and is quite vocal with her very negative opinion of him.

characters.name: Ender
characters.description: Enderis one of theS-Force's greatest enemies. He "ends things. People, planets, galaxies". He's voice by Dorian Harewood who played theCeruleans.

characters.name: Ender
characters.description: Enderis one of theS-Force's greatest enemies. He "ends things. People, planets, galaxies". He's voice by Dorian Harewood who played theCeruleans.

characters.name: Evil Coop
characters.description: And now thanks toyou, I have now know the coordinates to your dimension. I can destroy Earth all over again! ~Evil Coop to his good self. Evil CoopHis GrimHomeworldAlternate EarthAffiliationEvil Coop forcesSpeciesHumanGenderMaleHair colorRich blondSkin colorTanVoice actorDavid DeLuiseStatusUnknown Many years after defeating the Glorft and the destruction of the Karajor, he becomes corrupt and wanted to fight even more to the point he fought some of his old allies and enemies (Among them wasT-Bot,Magnanimous,R.E.C.R.and theS-Force) with brutality; because of this, he takes great joy destroying anyone or anything that gets in his way (such as wanting to destroy original Coop and his dimension along with the original Glorft). He seemed to be cynical about television programs he use to watch as he points out that wrestling is fake when Coop used such moves on him. Unlike his alternate counterpart, Evil Coop is more competent when it comes to fighting instead of bum rushing into enemies head on and winning through sheer luck. He look down at what he uses to be like which he mocks Coop's weight and calling Megas, a "toy". However, unlike Coop, who never quits from a fight no matter the odds stacked against him; Evil Coop seems to now back down from a fight when the odds are stack against him (such when his army was completely destroyed and was outnumbered by Coop and the Glorft army). Despite his rising descend into destructive behavior, he was caring enough to leave Megas in one piece back in his mother's house garage after he abandoned it (which in a way lead to his downfall as Coop then takes it for himself after his own Megas was destroyed by Evil Coop). Evil Coop still, like Coop, dust his hands off when he wins a fight. He also still relies onKivafor information and other actions (this is more so due toEvil Kivabeing his second in-command and takes her more seriously than Coop does with his dimension's Kiva).

characters.name: Evil Coop's Army
characters.description: Evil Coop's Armyare an army of mech drones under the command ofEvil Coopand his right hand womanEvil Kivaon AlternateEarth. They are composed of giant white drone mechs that all have the number 13 printed on their left chest and each of them are holding a laser rifle that fires powerful red beams in battle, and are capable of rocket booster flight from their jetback packs and feet. WhenCoopaccidentally activated a beacon signal of the Glorft battleshipKarajorremains that serves as the home ofAlternate Jamieand hisresistance forces, it drew attention of Evil Coop's Army and they invaded the base to destroy everything. Despite the efforts of Alternate Jamie and his forces piloting human-modifiedGlorftmechs, Evil Coop's Army forced them to retreat and completely destroyed the base.

characters.name: Evil Kiva
characters.description: Why are you helping this pale imitation? I thought you'd be happy to see Earth enslaved. Piloting her mech. Evil KivaisAlternate Coop'ssecond in command. Evil Kiva is now even more haughty and proud than she was when she first met Coop andJamie. Losing sight of her goals to return home to the future, she now only takes joy in planetary and inter-dimensional conquest and destruction, and the domination of her andEvil Coop's enemies. Evil Kiva deemsMegasand therebels' Glorft mechs to be outdated pieces of junk, and only sees her and Evil Coop's mechs to be superior in every way.

characters.description: Flex the FlattenerRobot FighterSpeciesRobotGenderUnknownEye colorWhiteSkin colorRedStatusUnknown Flex the Flattenerwas a robot fighter who only appeared inThe Return. Flex the Flattener was one of five robotic fighters summoned byMagnanimousin his plan to get revenge onCoopby holding a contest to claim Coops Championship Belt to tire out Coop so Magnanimous can finish him off. to be added

characters.name: Florxin
characters.description: Florxinis a crab like alien who performs transporting and clean-up tasks alongsideTolbit. Their first job was to dump theR.E.G.I.S. Mark 5into a black hole but thanks to Coop their mission was sabotaged. Florxin is tall cynical. He is the voice byWally Wingertwho played hisfriend.

characters.name: Franken
characters.description: FrankenRobotSpeciesRobotEye colorRedStatusDestroyed TheFrankenwas a robot made of junk built and piloted byVarsin. Varsin built the Franken and dubbed it his masterpiece, when Coop and the others landed on the Junk Planet varsin attacked them as he learned they had a Time Drive and wanted it to increase his collection. to be added

characters.name: Galaxia
characters.description: GalaxiaGalaxia is one member of the Ultra CadetsHomeworldUltra Cadet's planetAffiliationUltra CadetSpeciesHumanoidGenderFemaleHair colorBrownEye colorGreenSkin colorTanVoice actorJanice KawayeStatusAlive Galaxiais a humanoid female and member of a group called theUltra-Cadets, who defend their planet and people from evil. She is voiced byJanice Kawaye. Galaxia went to Earth to findCoop, but instead she mistook Coop forJamie. She and the others needed Coop's assistance in fighting theKurdock, so Jamie fooled her into taking him instead. Galaxia agreed that she and the other cadets would not be of much help to Jamie, so they agreed to let him fight Kurdock alone. After Jamie appears to defeat Kurdock, Galaxia and the other cadets hold a celebration on Jamie's honor. Just then Coop andKivaarrived looking for Jamie. Not aware of what is going on, Galaxia attempted to defend Jamie from what she assumed was a threat. Once the truth was revealed that Jamie was an impostor. Galaxia, along with the others angrily insisted that Coop and the others get him off their planet. Though while this was going on,Goatapparently caught her eye. Just before he left, she gave him her phone number. In the end, the Ultra-Cadets were attacked by the Kurdock, she apparently survived and later went with Goat to see a movie.

characters.name: Gentle Beast
characters.description: Gentle BeastAffiliationDMV BeastsSpeciesBeetle-Rhino AliensGenderMaleEye colorCyanSkin colorGreyVoice actorDee Bradley BakerStatusAlive The Gentle Beast or the DMV Beasts (in the credits) is a highly intellegent monster from another planet that was once put undermind control byDarklos.He and his people were being controlled by Darklos in order to captureKiva.  He fought withMegasand managed to pile onto Megas but Megas destroyed the ring controlling him.  They then tookDarklosand apoligized toCoopfor the trouble they caused.  He was was suprised that someone likeJamiehad the inteligence to talk, just as Jamie was. A gaint bipedal rhino beetle like monster  with forarms, an y shaped horn. His skin is Grey, he has simple cyan eyes,  and black armoring plates covering his back, stomach, and other parts of his body.  Compared with the other beast from his species which are with yellow skin and lower horns.

characters.name: Gina
characters.description: GinaHomeworldEarthAffiliationJamieSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleHair colorBlack, with a purple stripeEye colorBrownSkin colorLight tanVoice actorRachael MacFarlaneStatusAlive Ginais a girlfriend ofJamiethat once tried to date who thought he had a nice car (which actually belonged toCoopand wasMegas's head). So, Jamie lied to get her to go for a ride with him. At first Jamie had trouble driving the car. When Gina asked him if the car was supposed to be lurching, he lied about the car saying it was "environmentally friendly". The date went well until it turned into a cat and mouse chase with theGlorft. Once Coop regained control of Megas,Kivacommented on how much the pair had in common when Gina and Jamie started to get car-sick due to all the excitement. She was voicedRachael MacFarlane, who also voiced Mindy and Eris in The Grim Adventures of Billy and Mandy. Jamie- Jaime showed interest for her, but not until Coop helped him out, he actually got a change to talk to her. She liked Coop's car, but Jamie said it was his (Jamie asked Coop for the keys so they could go for a drive) She taught in some moments he was a creep but still enjoyed talking with him. Things seemed to be going well until the Mecha Mechas showed up and when Jaime had to rush in to save Coop she was scared. After that Coop fighting made her puke alongside Jaime and Kiva. "It seems these two are made for each other".

characters.name: Glorft Commander
characters.description: Are you suresir, shouldn't we destroyhim? TheEarthis defenseless!Weshould attack. -Glorft Commander TheGlorft CommanderisGorrath'simmedate subordinate. He seems to have an inferiority complex and is often scared of his commanding officer. His most common reaction when approached by Gorrath is to cower in fear and plead "Not the face!" He is the voicedKevin Michael Richardson. Who played POP T.V. ANNOUNCER , NEWS FLASH ANCHORPERSON, DREADLOCKED SOLDIER , BALD SOLDIER ,TinyandGeorgiein the series.

characters.name: Glorft Scientist
characters.description: Glorft ScientistHomeworldUnkownAffiliationGlorftGenderMaleHair colorNoneEye colorRedSkin colorGreyish GgreenStatusAlive  He is a member of theGlorftwho createdMecha-Megas, and presented it toGorrathas a new super weapon that could defeatCoopand bring back the prototype for the Glorft to win in the future. He was later seen in future episodes only in the background, it is certain that he died in theAlternate Dimmensionalongside the other Glorft members.

characters.name: Goat
characters.description: Between catching a tan on a scrap hill or relaxing in his favorite lawn chair,Goatis the owner and operator of the New Jersey's local dump junkyard in which Coop found MEGAS.. Goat runs the Jersey City Junkyard.  He has known Coop and Jamie all their lives and always gives them advice when needed.  Like Coop and Jamie, Goat loves heavy metal music and rocks out to it.  Like Jamie, Goat always tries to hit on girls, especially Kiva.  Though, he doesn't get much success (But got lucky withGalaxiaof the Ultra Cadets). He is the one who soldMegasto Coop for two dollars, as he toldCoopthat everything in Megas' pile was only two dollars. Goat is usually seen at his junkyard minding his own business, but sometimes gets involved with Coop and his company, while inside Megas.
